tasks.instruction: Find the closest gas station within 10 miles of ZIP code 94105 that is open 24/7 and has a car wash, and open its detail page.

tasks.instruction: From the available business fuel cards, choose one with a $0 annual fee and a fuel rebate of at least 3%, preferring the option with the highest rebate if there are multiple, and start an online application using the provided business details.
